title: TurnCredential
description: Server-issued, short-TTL TURN credential per the long-term-credential mechanism (RFC 8489 § 9.2 with HMAC-SHA1 derivation, as standardized by Cloudflare/Twilio/coturn). The signaling server is the only issuer; clients never construct or refresh credentials locally. Authoritative doctrine: `docs/architecture/turn-credentials.md`. Embedded inside the `TURN_CREDENTIALS` variant of `signaling-message.schema.json`.

username.description: `<expEpochSeconds>:<roomCode>:<peerId>`. The TURN server splits this on `:` to recover the expiry, the room scope, and the peer scope without consulting any database.

credential.description: Base64-encoded HMAC-SHA1 of `username` with the active shared secret (28 chars padded; 20 raw bytes). Verifiable by coturn via `lt-cred-mech` + `static-auth-secret-file`.

items.description: Canonical TURN URL form per RFC 7065. The schema rejects any non-`turn:` / `turns:` URL.

expiresAt.description: Wall-clock expiry in milliseconds since epoch. The signaling server enforces `expiresAt - now <= 300_000` (5 min hard ceiling) at issuance.
